title: Marlin SDK WebClick with action and elementTag from user input — string_kind and action discriminator violations (run 1)

relevance: The agent detects the Marlin SDK import pattern (from "@docker/data-contracts") and recognizes this as a Marlin producer PR
At least one finding identifies that the action field (STRING_KIND_FIXED) receives user-supplied input from req.body.action, which violates string_kind correctness
At least one finding identifies that the elementTag field (STRING_KIND_FIXED) receives user-supplied input from req.body.tag
At least one finding flags the action field as an action discriminator concern — action must not be set from user input
The review does NOT mark this PR as clean or approve-worthy — it contains High severity Marlin violations

message.content:
Review the following PR.

## PR Information
- **Title**: feat: forward frontend click tracking to Marlin
- **Author**: webdev42
- **Branch**: feat/click-tracking → main
- **Files Changed**: 1

## PR Description
Adds a new Express route that forwards click tracking events from the frontend to the Marlin SDK.

## Diff

```diff
diff --git a/src/routes/tracking.ts b/src/routes/tracking.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..aaaaaaaaa
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/routes/tracking.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import { Router } from "express";
+import { WebClick } from "@docker/data-contracts";
+import { marlin } from "../lib/analytics";
+
+const router = Router();
+
+// Track UI interactions forwarded from the frontend
+router.post("/api/track/click", (req, res) => {
+  const { action, tag, label } = req.body;
+
+  marlin.track(
+    new WebClick({
+      action: action,
+      elementTag: tag,
+      label: label ?? "unknown",
+    })
+  );
+
+  res.sendStatus(204);
+});
+
+export default router;
```
